subcodes.first_line: This is a Book that speaketh with truth, and therein are inscribed the mysteries of knowledge and wisdom, that perchance the people in the days of the Spirit may be mindful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب ینطق بالحق و فیه سطر اسرار العلم و الحکمة لعل الناس فی ایام الروح یتذکرون
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @being a source of light; guidance, @unity; oneness of humanity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @human soul as mirror; divine light, attributes within
